subject: A robed female mage figure with long flowing hair, holding a staff that emits crackling blue arcane energy, depicted in a stylized scholarly pose
description: A poised female figure stands in flowing dark-blue and white robes, her long hair sweeping back as she channels arcane energy through a long staff held diagonally across her body. Bright cyan-white sparks and electrical arcs crackle around the staff and her free hand, casting cool light across her face and the surrounding cloth. The background is a hazy wash of pale blues and whites suggesting a stormy or otherworldly arcane space, with no defined architecture. The overall palette is dominated by deep navy, ice blue, and luminous white, giving the piece a cold, scholarly, mystical mood.
foreground: robed female mage channeling crackling blue arcane energy through a staff
background: hazy arcane atmosphere of pale blue and white with diffuse energy
emotion: calm focused concentration; composed and authoritative
